$schema: PAT tracking manifest for automated expiration reminders. See .github/workflows/check-pat-expiration.yml.

pats.name: MOD_PROJECT_TOKEN
pats.scope: Organization Projects: Read + Write on gitpush-mod
used_by: each mod repo's .github/workflows/on-issue-close.yml (inherits via secrets: inherit)
pats.renew_steps: Regenerate on the fine-grained PATs page. Keep same permissions. Rotate value via: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Clipboard' | tr -d '\r\n' | gh secret set MOD_PROJECT_TOKEN --org gitpush-mod --visibility all

pats.name: PERSONAL_PROJECT_TOKEN
pats.renew_steps: Classic PAT — regenerate with same scopes (project + repo). Rotate value via: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Clipboard' | tr -d '\r\n' | gh secret set PERSONAL_PROJECT_TOKEN -R Godimas101/.github

pats.name: TCS_PROJECT_TOKEN
pats.scope: Organization Projects: Read + Write on The-Canadian-Space (assumed)
used_by: TCS ticket-first automation (verify actual workflow files)
pats.renew_steps: Verify expiration date and update this entry. If unknown, next login: run `gh api user | jq` on that PAT to see if it still auths.
